title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Solutions When PayPal and Stripe Ban Your Account — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Your PayPal account has been blocked in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan due to geographic restrictions. Stripe is no longer an option in these countries, and your Gumroad account has been flagged. You're left with a digital product to sell, but no way to process payments. This is a common problem for creators in restricted countries, and it's time to explore a solution that doesn't rely on PayPal or Stripe.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for creators to sell digital products, but they come with limitations. They require KYC (know-your-customer) verification, which can be a barrier for creators in restricted countries. They also have strict policies against certain countries, and their services can be revoked at any time. This leaves creators with no choice but to look for alternative solutions that can process payments without these restrictions.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip have country-specific restrictions that can block creators' accounts without warning. These restrictions can be based on the creator's location, the type of product being sold, or the payment method used. This means that even if you have a PayPal account, you can still be blocked if you're selling a product that's deemed 'high-risk' or if you're from a restricted country. A permanent structural alternative is needed to avoid these risks.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for payment processing, which can eat into your profits. They also have strict policies against certain types of products, which can lead to account restrictions and fees. In contrast, a crypto-native solution like Unchained Commerce offers low fees, fast payment processing, and complete control over your digital products. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can integrate a frontend wallet that accepts multiple cryptocurrencies, giving you more flexibility and control over your sales.
PayPal's block in Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan is permanent, and there's no way to restore your account.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a creator in a restricted country, it's time to consider a permanent structural alternative to PayPal and Stripe. With Unchained Commerce, you can sell your digital products without worrying about account restrictions or high fees. By integrating Web3 Wallet Connect, you can offer your customers a seamless payment experience across multiple cryptocurrencies. This is a game-changer for creators who want to focus on their content, rather than worrying about payment processing.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

Can I use PayPal or Stripe if I'm in a restricted country? Unfortunately, no. PayPal and Stripe have strict policies against certain countries, and their services can be revoked at any time. A crypto-native solution like Unchained Commerce offers a permanent structural alternative to these platforms, with low fees, fast payment processing, and complete control over your digital products.
Stripe's restrictions are so strict that even legitimate creators are getting flagged and blocked.
